text: Sign-off:  An ' .nwd ' file containing all signed-off models as well as a sign-off document that all subcontractors are required to sign. Once a model is ready for sign off Contractor's BIM Subcontractor will issue the model and a sign-off document that the subcontractor will need to sign and return. If that document is not returned or a written objection made within 3 days from the date issued, the model will be considered accepted and the coordination process will continue.
